narrative:
Beavercreek 002 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,708 registered voters, with 67.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
